body:value: The data refers to compensated injuries under the workmens compensation act. Under the act, Compensation is payable to workers employed in scheduled employment for injuries due to accident resulting in death or disablement for more than three days provided that it is not caused through the fault of the worker himself. This Act provides for the rate at which compensation shall be paid to an employee. This is one of many social security laws in India.
field_asset_jurisdiction:name: All India
field_group_name:name: Labour and Employment
field_ministry_department:name: Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation
field_sector:name: Labour and Employment
Statistics
title: Workmens Compensation
